title: the moment in EOE that made you Tear up
display_title: the moment in EOE that made you Tear up
wikitext:
[]: the moment in EOE that made you Tear-up....             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Tue Oct 24, 2006 7:21 pm the moments i EoE that made me tear-up was when Asuka has her revelation about the a.t. field And my favortive moment that ALWAYS makes me tear up because of its beutiy is that part was the Ambiguty scence in the train when Asuka sitting at the table with her head down and Shinji says "Asuka i wanna stay with you..." and the part after he knocks the table over and hits the chair and he says "help me..." and Asuka, I LOVE the way she look at that moment, responds "....no...." and shiji does nothing the music stops and her starts to choke her and lifts her up and "Komm susser tod" starts playing oh dude that part is the best.... :cry:

[]: Re: the moment in EOE that made you Tear-up....             Quote Post by Phaze » Tue Oct 24, 2006 8:30 pm Evangelion Oi! wrote: And my favortive moment that ALWAYS makes me tear up because of its beutiy is that part was the Ambiguty scence in the train when Asuka sitting at the table with her head down and Shinji says "Asuka i wanna stay with you..." and the part after he knocks the table over and hits the chair and he says "help me..." and Asuka, I LOVE the way she look at that moment, responds "....no...." and shiji does nothing the music stops and her starts to choke her and lifts her up and "Komm susser tod" starts playing oh dude that part is the best.... :cry:

[]:             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Tue Oct 24, 2006 10:42 pm Well, I normally don't tear up with an anime, especially NGE because I'm normally trying to figure out what the heck is going on, but the moment that sticks out in my mind that almost made me shed a tear was during the "Tang" scene when everyone is reverting back to LCL. The part when Maya sees Ritsuko again before she reverts is very well done.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Tue Oct 24, 2006 10:57 pm Evangelion has never made me tear up. Now, Transformers: The Movie... that movie is a veritable tear jerker.

[]:             Quote Post by KhakiBlueThunderSocks » Tue Oct 24, 2006 11:09 pm The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelion has never made me tear up. Now, Transformers: The Movie... that movie is a veritable tear jerker.

[]:             Quote Post by cat42 » Tue Oct 24, 2006 11:10 pm When Asuka finally realizes not only that her mother loves her, but that she's been there all along...

[]:             Quote Post by Mundane » Tue Oct 24, 2006 11:34 pm KhakiBlueThunderSocks wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelion has never made me tear up. Now, Transformers: The Movie... that movie is a veritable tear jerker.

[]:             Quote Post by toReason » Wed Oct 25, 2006 1:47 am Not so much having tears but during the scene in which Asuka realizes her mum is there and proceeds to kicks huge amounts of ass to then get beaten down. I was almost screaming at the tv as you would do during a football (read as soccer) game.

[]:             Quote Post by slothen » Wed Oct 25, 2006 2:18 am there were some moments that "got me" but none of them made me cry. Generally the anime that makes me cry, isn't considered "good" anime in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Wed Oct 25, 2006 2:48 am EoE was a sitting there in slack jawed shock and horror experience for me. slothen wrote: Generally the anime that makes me cry, isn't considered "good" anime in the first place.

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Oct 25, 2006 3:48 am I don't cry.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 25, 2006 8:33 am BobBQ wrote: I don't cry.

[]:             Quote Post by geishaboy » Wed Oct 25, 2006 8:47 am I had a few tears towards the end of the movie, it's quite the tear jerker My girlfriend got drunk and and decided she wanted to see it, she bawled her eyes out through the whole thing screaming "Shinji! Shinji!" Good times

[]:             Quote Post by BobBQ » Wed Oct 25, 2006 10:04 am Reichu wrote: Why's that? It's a very ordinary physiological reaction to stressors. (Like sneezing. Sorta.)

[]:             Quote Post by jcmoorehead » Wed Oct 25, 2006 10:05 am Death of Misato, Death of Asuka and the Komm Susser Todd Scenes. EoE is the only film thats ever made me tear up.

[]:             Quote Post by Reichu » Wed Oct 25, 2006 11:13 am BobBQ wrote: Nowdays I just don't react to things in the way most people seem to. Maybe I'm too jaded and cynical, or maybe the combination of AS and the realization that life has no greater meaning have rendered such emotional displays irrelevant for me.

[]:             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Wed Oct 25, 2006 12:08 pm Mundane wrote: The death of Optimus Prime devastated my childhood.

[]:             Quote Post by Evangelionfreak » Wed Oct 25, 2006 2:14 pm Mundane wrote: KhakiBlueThunderSocks wrote: The Eva Monkey wrote: Evangelion has never made me tear up. Now, Transformers: The Movie... that movie is a veritable tear jerker.

[]:             Quote Post by Hunter21 » Wed Oct 25, 2006 3:19 pm I felt pretty sad when Asuka and her mom died but I don't think I got teary eyed too much during Eva. Actually the end of Chrono Crusade got to me more than EoE did. I did cry at the end of Brian's Song but that is allowable even by man laws.

[]:             Quote Post by Lujerker » Wed Oct 25, 2006 4:11 pm In the film ???? maybe the death of Misato or when she and Shinji talks before her death....
summary: []: the moment in EOE that made you Tear-up....             Quote Post by Evangelion Oi! » Tue Oct 24, 2006 7:21 pm the moments i EoE that made me tear-up was when Asuka has her revelation about the a.t. field And my favortive moment that ALWAYS makes me tear up because of its beutiy is that part was the Ambiguty scence in the train when Asuka sitting at the table with her head down and Shinji says "Asuka i wanna stay with you..."
